headline: TWO PATHS, ONE STANDARD
subheading: Weigh cost, compliance risk and control to choose the right Qualified Person model
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition exploring a pivotal pharmaceutical staffing decision: two diverging premium pathways carved in a polished surface, one rendered in deep navy, the other in luminous teal, converging on a single balanced focal point. A sleek minimalist scale or fulcrum sits at the centre, one pan holding a stack of crisp sealed batch-certification dossiers, the other holding a sealed clear pharmaceutical vial, perfectly balanced to evoke weighing cost against risk and control. Subtle circuit-like data lines and faint molecular helix motifs trace through the deep navy background, suggesting governance, oversight and quality systems. Cool teal and cyan light gradients sweep across immaculate reflective surfaces with a single delicate fresh-green accent glow marking the point of decision. Shallow depth of field, soft directional studio lighting, sterile yet warm clinical-luxury mood, immaculate glossy surfaces with gentle reflections, sophisticated and authoritative, premium pharmaceutical brand aesthetic, 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
